response.step_by_step_log: 1. Monitored the entire video for any vocal music. 2. Identified multiple distinct scenes based on visual setting changes, starting with playground, phone conversation, outside walking, gym, practice room, office, and ending with merchandise promotion. 3. Confirmed that all audio consists only of voice acting and instrumental background music. 4. No vocal songs or lyrics were detected.
response.global_summary: This video is a promotional clip for Laplus Darkness's 2026 birthday merchandise. It features several short, conversational scenes in different virtual locations, followed by a product showcase segment. There is instrumental background music throughout the video, but no vocal music or songs are performed.

scenes.description: Two VTubers are having a conversation in a playground setting.
A transition scene featuring a sound effect.
Laplus Darkness is talking on the phone in an office setting.
Laplus Darkness is walking outside, feeling exhausted after training.
Laplus Darkness is in a gym, lifting a barbell.
Laplus Darkness is in a practice room, stretching/dancing.
Laplus Darkness enters an office and speaks with another character regarding merchandise.
The two characters showcase various items from the 2026 birthday merchandise set.
